moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix is set to take place at Silverstone on July 5, as part of the 2026 F1 season.

angles.name: Racing Frenzy
angles.copy: Get ready for high-speed action as the British Grand Prix kicks off on July 5 at Silverstone.

angles.name: F1 History
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix has a rich history in the world of Formula 1, with this year's event being the 12th round of the 2026 season.

angles.name: Silverstone Prep
angles.copy: With just a few days to go, Silverstone is gearing up to host the British Grand Prix, one of the most highly anticipated events in the F1 calendar.

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is scheduled to take place at Royal Birkdale from July 16 to 19, 2026.

angles.name: Golfing Greats
angles.copy: The Open Championship is one of the most prestigious events in golf, with the world's top players competing for the coveted title.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale in England is set to host The Open Championship for the 10th time, offering a challenging course for the competitors.

angles.name: Teeing Off
angles.copy: The 154th Open Championship promises to be an exciting event, with four days of golfing action at Royal Birkdale.

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, one of Europe's largest agricultural events, is scheduled to take place from July 20 to 23, 2026, at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells.

angles.name: Agricultural Excellence
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a celebration of agriculture, livestock, and rural life in Wales, showcasing the best of Welsh farming.

angles.name: Welsh Farming
angles.copy: As one of the biggest agricultural shows in Europe, the Royal Welsh Show highlights the importance of farming in Wales and its contribution to the local economy.

angles.name: Llanelwedd Fun
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show at Llanelwedd offers a fun-filled experience for visitors, with activities, exhibits, and entertainment for all ages.

moments.title: Summer in the UK
moments.blurb: July has arrived, marking the peak of summer in the UK, with warm weather and long days perfect for outdoor activities.

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: July is here, bringing with it the warmth and sunshine of summer, ideal for enjoying the great outdoors in the UK.

angles.name: Outdoor Fun
angles.copy: Make the most of the summer season by exploring the UK's beautiful landscapes, parks, and gardens, perfect for picnics, walks, and more.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: As the temperatures rise, remember to stay cool and hydrated during the hot summer days, with tips from the Met Office on how to beat the heat.
